whyMaxima.intro: Maxima Pools is a family-owned installer serving Central Ohio. Backed by San Juan Pools — the industry leader in fiberglass pool quality since 1958.

card1.title: Authorized San Juan Pools Dealer
card1.description: We exclusively offer San Juan fiberglass pools — the strongest, most durable pool shells manufactured in America since 1958.

card2.title: Superior Quality Guaranteed
card2.description: Every pool backed by industry-leading warranties and built to last a lifetime.

card3.title: Full-Service Installation
card3.description: We handle everything from excavation to the finishing touches — pool, plumbing, electrical, concrete, and landscaping.

card4.title: Family-Owned & Operated
card4.description: We treat every project like it's our own home. Personalized service, transparent pricing, and genuine care.

card5.title: Best of the Best
card5.description: Quality Fiberglass Pools since 1958. The strongest pool shells manufactured in America.

featuredPools.intro: Find the shape that fits your backyard — built by San Juan Pools, installed by Maxima.

featured.name: Atlantic
featured.description: One of our most popular swimming pools, the Atlantic features a conservative free-form layout with a traditional shallow-to-deep end design. The spacious swim area, built-in bench seating, and generous tanning ledge make it ideal for both relaxation and entertaining.

process.intro: Not all fiberglass pools are built the same. San Juan uses 100% hand-laid fiberglass with marine-grade Vinyl Ester resin — the strongest pool shells manufactured in America.

steps.title: Precision Mold
steps.description: Every San Juan pool starts with a precisely waxed mold to ensure perfect shape accuracy. Each mold is engineered for exact dimensions and contours.

steps.title: Hand-Laid Fiberglass
steps.description: All fiberglass is 100% hand-laid — never sprayed. Expert laminators with 20+ years of experience lay minimum five layers of woven roving for superior structural consistency.

steps.title: Build the Panels
steps.description: Each section is carefully hand-laid to maintain even thickness across the entire shell. Up to 72oz of woven fiberglass per square yard creates unmatched structural integrity.

steps.title: Structural Reinforcement
steps.description: Structural ribs are positioned to reinforce wall strength. Using Vinyl Ester resin throughout — the same marine-grade standard used in boat building.

steps.title: Clean & Inspect
steps.description: Every pool is thoroughly cleaned and inspected. All imperfections are repaired — only perfection is good enough for a San Juan pool.

steps.title: Tile & Outfit
steps.description: Pools are tiled and outfitted with all necessary fittings, returns, and drains. Each component is installed by hand to ensure a watertight, flawless finish.

steps.title: Expert Installation
steps.description: Our Maxima crew handles excavation, pool placement, plumbing, electrical, concrete patios, and all finishing touches. Your backyard paradise — complete.

poolShapes.intro: Every backyard is unique. Choose from three distinct pool shapes, each designed to complement different spaces and styles.

shapes.name: Rectangular
shapes.description: Clean lines and a timeless choice. Optimal for lap swimming — simple, elegant, and infinitely versatile. 49 models available.

shapes.name: Freeform
shapes.description: Dramatic curves for a natural, modern look. Perfect for informal backyards and creative landscapes. Includes Roman and oval shapes.

outdoorLiving.intro: Your pool is just the beginning. We design and build complete backyard retreats — from custom patios and outdoor kitchens to fire features and shade structures.
outdoorLiving.heroImageAlt: Luxury outdoor entertaining area with grill

services.title: Outdoor Kitchens
services.description: Custom-built kitchens with grills, countertops, sinks, and pizza ovens for the ultimate entertaining space.

services.title: Fire Features
services.description: Fire pits and seating walls that extend your outdoor season and create an inviting atmosphere year-round.

services.title: Shelters & Shade
services.description: Pergolas, pavilions, and gazebos that provide comfortable shade and define your outdoor rooms.

poolSizes.intro: From compact plunge pools to expansive family retreats, find the perfect size for your space.

sizes.description: Compact pools ideal for smaller backyards or less maintenance. Perfect cozy retreats that still deliver the full pool experience.
The perfect balance of space and practicality. Room for fun with the whole family — the most popular size range among our customers.
Transform your backyard into an entertainment center. Spacious swim areas with room for tanning ledges, benches, and attached spas.

poolSizes.ctaText: Not sure which size is right? Visualize it in your own backyard.
